model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on a button that says "CLICK ME".
I need to find the coordinates of the "CLICK ME" button.
The image shows a dark grey background with a green button in the center.
The button is bounded by a white rectangle.
The text "CLICK ME" is inside the green button.

Coordinates of the button:
Left: 452
Top: 459
Right: 548
Bottom: 545

Center X: (452 + 548) / 2 = 1000 / 2 = 500
Center Y: (459 + 545) / 2 = 1004 / 2 = 502

Confidence is 1.0 as the target is clearly visible.
